use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH KRAS G12C-MUTATED LOCALLY ADVANCED OR METASTATIC NON-SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER (NSCLC), AS DETERMINED BY AN FDA APPROVED TEST, WHO HAVE RECEIVED AT LEAST ONE PRIOR SYSTEMIC THERAPY

TREATMENT, IN COMBINATION WITH CETUXIMAB, OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH KRAS G12C-MUTED LOCALLY ADVANCED OR METASTATIC COLORECTAL CANCER, PER FDA APPROVED TEST, WHERE PRIOR TREATMENT WITH FLUOROPYRIMIDINE-, OXALIPLATIN-, AND IRINOTECAN-BASED CHEMOTHERAPY
